statement: When intraday order-imbalance proxy and relative volume expansion occur against a stretched RSI move, a short-horizon reversion setup can capture liquidity normalization within 1 to 6 hours.
rationale: Flow pressure and temporary imbalance can overshoot fair value intraday. Requiring technical stretch plus trend context reduces random noise entries.
entry_trigger: Enter reversion when imbalance_proxy >= threshold, relative_volume >= 1.6x baseline, and RSI(14) >= 72 for short side or <= 28 for long side.
exit_trigger: Exit at RSI mean reversion band (45-55), or stop at 1.2*ATR adverse move, or hard timeout at 6 hours.
